vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group-

triage_decision.reason: This finding involves setting standard file permissions on a backup copy of /etc/group. The remediation is a simple chmod command that does not affect system authentication, networking, or filesystems. It is a low-risk, low-complexity change that follows standard STIG hardening patterns.
